title: Diagnostics, Build Reports, Metrics, Profiles, and Failure Triage · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs diagnostics, build reports, metrics, profiles, and failure triage from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded actionable build and publication evidence report after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Represent severity, stable code, source span, stage, message, safe context, cause, suggestion, and ownership separately.
Sort deterministically, deduplicate, cap cascades, promote configured warnings, summarize omissions, and return status from policy.
Record admitted and rejected files, pages, assets, links, bytes, cache hits, stage durations, peak memory, validation findings, and artifact digest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

Artifact under review: bounded actionable build and publication evidence report.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Redaction Retention, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Redaction Retention
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Redaction Retention: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review publishing team handles case 3883 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to produce deterministic located diagnostics and bounded redacted build metrics; preserve source spans, Unicode policy, trust classification, route base, contextual encoding, diagnostics, and accessibility decisions; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Redact secrets, home paths, private content, and identifiers; bound logs; define retention; and preserve enough identity for causal comparison.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Redaction Retention.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Redaction Retention, keep Redaction Retention connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Redact secrets, home paths, private content, and identifiers; bound logs; define retention; and preserve enough identity for causal comparison.

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Redaction Retention, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Redaction Retention precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Redaction Retention, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review publishing team handles case 3883 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to produce deterministic located diagnostics and bounded redacted build metrics; preserve source spans, Unicode policy, trust classification, route base, contextual encoding, diagnostics, and accessibility decisions; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Redact secrets, home paths, private content, and identifiers; bound logs; define retention; and preserve enough identity for causal comparison.

For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Redaction Retention, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: Local build logs cannot expose sensitive information.
